case_title: PREPRESS ASSEMBLY, INC. VS. IMPRINTS UNLIMITED, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PREPRESS ASSEMBLY, INC. SERVED JAN-03-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT IMPRINTS UNLIMITED, INC.
